Star Atlas 1,000 Concurrent Players Stress Test

Ready to test the future of Web3 Gaming? 

Join us on January 17 at 12PM ET for a 24 hour stress test of our new multiplayer experience, targeting 1,000 concurrent players in a single Volant Station instance!
